message:
Flush oversized single conversations immediately and propagate remote scan errors

StreamingBatchSender now auto-flushes when a single conversation alone
exceeds the batch message or character limits, preventing it from being
stuck in the buffer indefinitely.

Remote scan failures are now forwarded as ScanError messages through the
channel so the consumer can record them in connector stats, making scan
problems visible in progress reporting.

Added a startup warning that logs any connectors still using buffered
(non-streaming) scan, to track migration progress.

Includes tests for the oversized-conversation auto-flush and for remote
scan error propagation into connector stats.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
